new_classes.definition_en: Other fermented beverage (heading 2206) that is sparkling, as determined by additional note 10 to Chapter 22 (excess pressure ≥ 3 bar at 20 °C, mushroom stopper or equivalent), presented in containers of a nominal capacity not exceeding 2 litres; classified under CN code 2206 00 31.

coverage_explanation: The core distinguishing criteria for CN 2206 00 31 are captured: (1) membership in heading 2206 other fermented beverages (via parent class OtherFermentedBeverage), (2) sparkling character as defined by additional note 10 to Chapter 22 (modelled via CarbonatedQuality, excessPressureBar ≥ 3 bar, and MushroomStopperBottleQuality from the existing TBox), and (3) small container (≤ 2 L, via SmallContainer restriction, distinguishing from 2206 00 39 which covers containers > 2 L). Coverage is not 1.0 because: (a) the additional note 10 definition of "sparkling" and the detailed mushroom-stopper criteria are referenced by cross-reference only (no full formalisation of the alternative criteria in that note, e.g. tied wire/string, pressure test at 20 °C), (b) the mixtures criterion (fermented + non-fermented beverages) covered by FermentedBeverageMixture is not explicitly re-asserted here as it is a subclass of OtherFermentedBeverage in the TBox, and (c) Piquette (CN 2206 00 10) must be excluded, but disjointness with Piquette is not modelled as that would require a complement restriction not easily grounded here.
